ulasan.Ulasan: Alhamdulillah ke sini Pas Acara Haul Habib Abu Bakar Bin Muhammad Assegaf. Masjid yg sangan luas. Megah termasuk masjid tua juga umurnya parkiran mobil dan motor banyak toilet kamar mandi tempat wudhu banyak. Bersih di samping halaman masjid terdapat makam Al Habib Abu Bakar Assegaf. Di sekitar masjid banyak kulineran dan ga jauh dari masjid jamik ada Makan Sunan Gresik. Next time insya Alloh ke sini lagi
ulasan.teks_final: alhamdulillah sini pas acara haul habib abu bakar bin muhammad assegaf masjid sangan luas megah termasuk masjid tua umurnya parkiran mobil motor banyak toilet kamar mandi tempat wudhu banyak bersih samping halaman masjid terdapat makam al habib abu bakar assegaf sekitar masjid banyak kulineran jauh masjid jamik makan sunan gresik next time insya alloh sini

ulasan.Ulasan: Masjid Jami' Gresik is basically the iconic mosque for Gresik locals. People always say it just feels cool and peaceful the moment you step inside. Super comfortable for prayer, and the vibe gets extra special during EID. You’ll see everyone from kids to grandparents choosing to pray here year after year. It’s an old mosque and part of Gresik’s heritage. First built by Nyai Ageng Pinatih, Sunan Giri’s foster mom, it started as a simple wooden structure in an open field. It burned down and got struck by lightning a few times over the years, with the last big renovation wrapping up in 1929. Architecturally it’s a cool mix of Javanese, colonial, and Indonesian styles. The Soko Guru pillars, Soko Rowo, and layered wooden roof really stand out, plus the pillars have beautiful calligraphy and an 8-point Majapahit sun motif. What makes it different is the ablution area — there’s even an underground wudhu place. Parking is well managed too, though there are a lot of stairs so you’ve gotta watch for little kids. Beyond prayer, it’s also a hub for Islamic learning with TPQ, Tahfidz, and Diniyah classes. The mosque area has tombs of respected figures like Habib Abu Bakar bin Muhammad Assegaf, Habib Alwi, and others. The admins do a solid job managing waqf funds for schools, mosque upkeep, and orphan donations. So, if you are in Gresik you should stop by. It’s not just a place of worship — it’s a religious and historical spot with calm vibes and great management. And if you’re into photography or videography, the Javanese + colonial architecture makes for some really aesthetic shots.

ulasan.Ulasan: Semoga bisa kembali setiap tahunnya ke masjid ini

Masjid Jami yang berhadapan dengan alun-alun gresik. Tempat nya juga strategis, fasilitas lengkap, tempat wudu bersih nyaman, ada mukena untuk jamaah yang tidak membawa, area parkir motor mobil juga ada, tersedia wifi di halaman masjid. Ada tempat ngaji untuk anak.

ulasan.Ulasan: Tempat wudhu luas. Masjid luas dan bertingkat. Ada beberapa langai dengan desain mezanin. Bersih dan ditata rapi. Dilengkapi cctv yang menjangkau banyak area. Parkir tersedia cukup banyak. Disediakan air minum gratis. Parkir juga gratis. Jika mau infaq untuk parkir silakan.
